findings.title: KiCad project is missing schematic or board file
findings.message: Project a/a.kicad_pro is missing an associated schematic and board file.
findings.remediation: Add the missing design file or configure BoardGuard to scan the correct project path.

findings.title: KiCad project is missing schematic or board file
findings.message: Project b/b.kicad_pro is missing an associated schematic and board file.
findings.remediation: Add the missing design file or configure BoardGuard to scan the correct project path.

findings.title: kicad-cli is unavailable
findings.message: kicad-cli was not found, so KiCad-backed ERC and DRC checks were skipped.
findings.remediation: Install KiCad CLI or configure kicad-cli-path.

findings.title: manufacturing release metadata is missing
findings.message: No boardguard.yml manufacturing release metadata was found.
findings.remediation: Add boardguard.yml with board name, revision, output profile, and release artifact policy.

findings.title: multiple KiCad projects found without explicit selection
findings.message: 2 KiCad projects were found without an explicit project selection.
findings.remediation: Set the project input to the intended .kicad_pro path.
